leadText: The Mystic Water (Japanese: しんぴのしずく Mysterious Droplet) is a type-enhancing item introduced in Generation II that boosts the power of Water-type moves.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generations II and III [ edit | edit source ] Boosts the power of the holder's Water-type moves by 10%. Generation IV onward [ edit | edit source ] Boosts the power of the holder's Water-type moves by 20%.
